conflicts.description: The prior continuity sheet treated post-battle node maintenance as checks for 'seep, brightness, load, and travel.' Chapter 18 instead surfaces first-light/last-light maintenance for seep, brightness, and load, while line travel and black sweating are separate warning conditions.
conflicts.canonical_value: First-light/last-light maintenance tracks seep, brightness, and load; line travel or black sweating are escalation warnings.
conflicts.resolution_note: Updated to the explicit maintenance hand and Tallow's spoken instructions in chapter 18. No chapter-to-chapter contradiction in the manuscript itself required override.
